title: MCCI Utilities and Optimization Pack [Unofficial]
description: Modpack with a collection of mods to be used on MCC Island.
body:
## This modpack is not officially associated with or endorsed by the Noxcrew. No mods in this pack are made by me.

# MCCI Utilities and Optimization Pack
An unofficial collection of mods that are useful for playing on MCC Island. Includes utility mods for the server, optimization mods, GUI and visual mods, and a few mods that are just for aesthetics.

### Things you should know
- This modpack includes Methane instead of Starlight, which provides better performance by essentially removing lighting from the game entirely. This gives the game the same effect as fullbright with performance benefits. If you would prefer fullbright to be disabled, you can manually replace Methane with Starlight.
- Options added by the pack can be changed in each mod's configuration screen in the Mod Menu.

### Yeah, but what features does this modpack have anyway?
- **Game Music**: EpicLandlord's absolute bangers of tracks from the MCC event are now played in their respective games! You can also turn it off if it isn't your thing (I call that bad taste)
- **Cosmetic Previews**: Inspect how a cosmetic looks on your character before equipping or purchasing it!
- **Visual & Accessibility Improvements**: Noxesium brings player heads into GUIs and hides those annoying ghost tooltips, Companion adds handy toasts as notifications, and Island Utils lets you switch chat channels with ease!
- **Optimization. Like, a lot of it**: Optimizes your game to the point that loading screens are gone
- **...and more**

This modpack is designed to be useful for both casual and competitive players on the server, whilst still being lightweight in appearance and mod list.

*Further Clarification: This is not an official modpack in any way. The only official modpack for the server can be found on the MCC forums [here](https://mcchampionship.com/threads/guide-optimized-client-for-playing-on-mcci.2943/). This pack was created as I wanted to include utility mods and more optimization mods not included on Noxcrew's optimized client.*
